meta.tagline: Interactive editing canvas for AI video prompts with semantic span labeling, click-to-enhance suggestions, and fast previews.

featureFlags.name: convergence
featureFlags.description: Enables continuity/convergence services. When false, continuitySessionService resolves to null.

featureFlags.name: videoJobWorkerDisabled
featureFlags.description: Forces video worker loops off even when PROCESS_ROLE=worker. Used for emergency drain.

featureFlags.name: videoDlqReprocessorEnabled
featureFlags.description: Dead-letter-queue reprocessor for failed video jobs.

featureFlags.name: videoAssetReconcilerEnabled
featureFlags.description: Video asset orphan-detection reconciler. Opt-in (default off).

featureFlags.name: allowUnhealthyGemini
featureFlags.description: Use Gemini even when the provider health check fails. Useful for dev/debug; not recommended in production.

featureFlags.name: faceEmbeddingEnabled
featureFlags.description: Enables face embedding service for continuity quality gates. Requires Replicate API token.

featureFlags.name: continuityClipEnabled
featureFlags.description: Enables CLIP embedding in continuity quality gate checks.

featureFlags.name: depthWarmupOnStartup
featureFlags.description: Controls depth estimation service warmup during server boot.

featureFlags.name: unhandledRejectionMode
featureFlags.description: How unhandled promise rejections are categorized. `strict` exits the process; `classified` logs and continues.
